标题:
#Top Version Givenchy 24/ Latest 4G Low-Top Running Shoes  
Classic and timeless, factory direct! Exclusive inner and outer mold design! Signature Givenchy large G logo craftsmanship. Multi-color combinations highlight Givenchy’s trendy, youthful personality.  
All leather edges are coated for a clean finish. Complex craftsmanship, repeatedly tested to match the original!  
✔️ Material: Silk calf leather with patent leather  
✔️ Lining: Original breathable mesh combination  
✔️ Outsole: TPU + vacuum-molded lightweight sole  
✔️ Insole: Calf leather with embossed logo  
✔️ Size: Men’s 38-45 (sizes 38 and 45 are custom, no returns)
